data.title: V10 Dodge Viper v V8 Challenger DRAG RACE_transcript

paragraphs.context: v10 dodge viper v v8 challenger drag race _ transcript what will ' ll win in a drag race between a dodge challenger and an old dodge viper gts mark i well we ' re going to find out cuz i ' m going to race them over the standing quarter mile i ' m al waton and you ' re watching carwow the dodge viper gts has an 8 l natur aspirated v10 that puts out 456 horsepower and 664 newt m of torque it drives the rear wheels vi a six - speed manual gearbox the car weighs in at 1, 595 kg when it was new in 1998 the car cost £69, 000 though today this very example is valued at £78, 000 the dodge challenger rt scat pack has a 6.4 l v8 with 492 horsepower and 644 nm of torque it drives the rear wheels vi an 8 - speed automatic gearbox the car weighs in at 1, 957 kg in the us this car is currently on sale from around $ 50, 000 which is about £40, 000 however here in the uk this particular one is valu at £65, 000 in the viper we have its owner adam c you ' re probably familiar with his youtube channel so adam we ' re having a bit of a mopar battle old versus newer what do you think is going to happen obviously i think the old ' s going to win cuz why else would i bought it yeah it ' s going to be close isn ' t it you ' ve got a bigger engine but less power i think you got less weight you got manual gearbox and no traction control i ' ve got an auto and launch control how much power have you got getting on for 500 more more than you but not a considerable amount more not enough i don ' t think it ' s going to be interesting i mean i remember playing gran turismo back in the day and that was one of the fastest cars you could get it was so cool the mark i v i think i prefer it than the mark 1 i ' ve driven the mark 1 never driven the mark 2 oh yeah i have driven a mark i yeah everyone i i bump into in a petrol station they ' re like oh the grand turismo car or post on the wall and that ' s why i bought was it exactly so how much was it it was a lot um i definitely overpaid for this car they they average about 60 i ' ll say that they average about did
